variants: Millicent Ong, who was born in Garnetwing Hollow, has established her career at Shimmerstep Lighting in Robingale Park. She graduated from the Eboncrown School of Medicine, where she built a solid foundation for her work in the lighting industry. Through her imaginative and dedicated contributions, Millicent was honored with the Illuminated Pathmark Ribbon, recognizing her significant influence on the field. Her journey exemplifies both her professional growth and her commitment to innovation in lighting design.
